message:
Fix string method type inference

Enhanced type inferrer to recognize string methods:
- upper, lower, strip, lstrip, rstrip return string
- capitalize, title, swapcase, replace, join return string
- split() returns list of strings

This fixes print() showing correct text format for method results:
- print(text.upper()) now shows "HELLO" not byte array

Test results: 25 → 28 passing (+3 tests)
